nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 中非共和國
nodes.summary: 中非共和國是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联127种鸟类，包括Black guinea fowl、Schlegel's francolin、Heuglin's spurfowl等127种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 农药污染
nodes.summary: 农业化学品通过水体和食物链影响鸟类生存。

nodes.name: 奈及利亞
nodes.summary: 奈及利亞是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联144种鸟类，包括非洲黑鴨、Black guinea fowl、White-throated francolin等144种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 撒哈拉沙漠
nodes.summary: 撒哈拉沙漠是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联45种鸟类，包括鸵鸟、白臉樹鴨、Black guinea fowl等45种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 马里
nodes.summary: Mali, officially the Republic of Mali, is a landlocked country in West Africa.

nodes.name: Verreaux's eagle-owl
nodes.summary: Verreaux's eagle-owl（Verreaux's eagle-owl，学名 Ketupa lactea），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原、沼泽，主要威胁包括农药污染。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: 2005"/> Eastward from those countries to the Central African Republic, the species is distributed in a narrow transitional zone between the Sahara and rainforests. Seemingly isolated populations occur in central Nigeria and central Mali.Buxton, P

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Bird observation in the Ogaden Region Somali Regional State,/Ethiopia A Contribution to the Identification of Important Bird Areas. This species inhabits mainly savanna with scattered trees and thorny vegetation

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Ostrich, 40(S1), 179-192. They also range into riverine forest adjacent to savanna and small, semi-open woodland surrounded by open country, though they are less likely to inhabit heavily wooded habitats. South African eagle-owls are not infrequently found around floodplains and marshes, which may provide the primary nesting habitat in some areas. In Uganda, they are largely associated with riparian woodlands.Seavy, N

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Comparative study of general public owl knowledge in Costa Rica, Central America and Malawi, Africa. An additional threat is the residual effects of pesticides, as poison (usually through rodenticide or poisoned carcasses left out for scavengers such as jackals) consumed through prey may badly affect them.Herholdt, J
